title: rosa lutetiana var. cariotii
intro: Rosa lutetiana var. cariotii, also known as the Rosa caryophyllata var. cariotii or Wild Carnation, is a fragrant, pink-flowering shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oils, which have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa lutetiana var. cariotii include its use as a natural remedy for sore throats, coughs, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and reduce stress. Rosa lutetiana var. cariotii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
